<?php declare(strict_types=1); /** * This file is part of phpDocumentor. * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. * * @link http://phpdoc.org */ namespace phpDocumentor\Reflection\DocBlock\Tags\Formatter; use phpDocumentor\Reflection\DocBlock\Tag; use phpDocumentor\Reflection\DocBlock\Tags\Formatter; use function max; use function str_repeat; use function strlen; class AlignFormatter implements Formatter { /** @var int The maximum tag name length. */ protected int $maxLen = 0; /** * @param Tag[] $tags All tags that should later be aligned with the formatter. */ public function __construct(array $tags) { foreach ($tags as $tag) { $this->maxLen = max($this->maxLen, strlen($tag->getName())); } } /** * Formats the given tag to return a simple plain text version. */ public function format(Tag $tag): string { return '@' . $tag->getName() . str_repeat( ' ', $this->maxLen - strlen($tag->getName()) + 1 ) . $tag; } }
